goals: crud app with tables and forms
title: CRUD Admin Dashboard
description: Complete route for a data management admin dashboard: auth-gated UI, data tables with sorting and filtering, and validated forms for create/edit/delete.

steps.description: Set up styling with Tailwind CSS v4
Install shadcn/ui for admin UI components
Set up Drizzle ORM for type-safe database access
Add authentication and protect admin routes
Add sortable, filterable, paginated data tables
Build validated create/edit forms with Zod
Set up unit and integration tests
